reviews.text: Course was packed and overbooked so we didn’t get to finish all 18holes start at 4:30 and round wasn’t completed by 7:40 had 2 holes left. Course played great and was in moderate condition with greens being a bit on the slower side. Course was open and very beginner friendly. This was a hotspot for locals to golf and didn’t feel as private as the others in Asheville area

Great course! Only played 9 holes as a twilight and course was in great shape outside tee boxes. Greens were fast and well maintained. Fairways were trimmed nice and rough was thicker than most courses. Starters were great as well.

Free range time included in tee time, they have 2 ranges, turf for irons only behind clubhouse and then a grass range for all clubs on the way to hole 1. Cart came with 4 waters tees and towels. Course played great but was up hill for a good portion of it.

Fastest greens imaginable. Impeccable views and valley golf, course was in amazing shape. Only downside is frost delay was enforced when we arrived (1st on tee) and made us wait an hour but course was well worth it!

scheduling_chat.text: This chat is for scheduling tee times and reviewing upcoming events instead of making 100 groupchats lol

course_reviews.text: Fastest greens imaginable. Impeccable views and valley golf, course was in amazing shape. Only downside is frost delay was enforced when we arrived (1st on tee) and made us wait an hour but course was well worth it!

Course was packed and overbooked so we didn’t get to finish all 18holes start at 4:30 and round wasn’t completed by 7:40 had 2 holes left. Course played great and was in moderate condition with greens being a bit on the slower side. Course was open and very beginner friendly. This was a hotspot for locals to golf and didn’t feel as private as the others in Asheville area

Free range time included in tee time, they have 2 ranges, turf for irons only behind clubhouse and then a grass range for all clubs on the way to hole 1. Cart came with 4 waters tees and towels. Course played great but was up hill for a good portion of it.
